change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: 1.     Conduct a Training of Trainers (ToT) to contextualize the S4P methodology in Nepal.2.     Mapping and formation of 3 community S4P groups (25 members per group) that identify C&Y members who are at risk and/or victims & survivors of TIP.3.     Support psychosocial resilience and agency of 75 C&Y (from the 3 community S4P groups) through S4P methodology.4.     Support awareness raising of youth-and survivor led initiatives built by the at-risk C&Y and survivors themselves on improved TIP prevention and reintegration of survivors targeting their communities and decision-makers.5.     Conduct survivor-informed vulnerability mapping to identify C&Y at risk and victims & survivors of TIP and their needs.6.     Adapt and upgrade referral pathways based on mapping conducted under activity 1.2.2.7.     Assist and/or refer 50 C&Y at risk and /or victims & survivors of TIP and their families to social protection schemes and other services.8.     Deliver training on survivor and trauma-informed care (4 days residential) for identification and response mechanisms to 45 key duty bearers.9.     Organize workshops on the government case management system for key duty bearers and child protection workers.10.  Deliver non-residential 3-day training on MHPSS to 175 service providers.11.  Organize a 3-day survivor led residential workshop to collect testimonies, analysis, and generate strategy paper for evidence-based advocacy.12.  Facilitate dialogue at the local, provincial, and federal level to foster cooperation among TIP survivor networks to produce a model of victim identification tool.13.  Support the development of a plan of action for the victim identification tool.14.  Organize transborder TIP stakeholder meetings to strengthen the rescue-repatriation processes.Lobby through the NCCHT to develop and endorse a victim identification tool.

en.full: Addressing the needs and empowering children and youth at risk and survivors of human trafficking through survivor-led actions

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
